canonical_definition: The latent ability to perform inference using only information provided in the context, without relying on internally stored factual knowledge, encompassing arithmetic, symbolic, and logical operations.
papers: SafetyQuizzer: Timely and Dynamic Evaluation on the Safety ofLLMs

definitions.text: The latent ability to perform inference using only information provided in the context, without relying on internally stored factual knowledge, encompassing arithmetic, symbolic, and logical operations.
The model's ability to perform step-by-step logical inference within the prompt context, integrating retrieved knowledge to make judgments without fine-tuning.
definitions.paper: SafetyQuizzer: Timely and Dynamic Evaluation on the Safety ofLLMs
